companies.name: Neta V
companies.description: Crossover & Fastback Design Smooth Powerful Elegant Agile. Features dolphin streamline with low wind resistance, hawk-eye laser headlights, suspended roof, and 4070 mm length.

companies.name: CG Education
companies.description: CG Education aims to be the best in the education sector, through quality, scale and dynamism. The intent is to provide educational services involving world-class processes, practices, and resources to produce smart, bright and confident students. CG Education's goal is to blend quality education with growth and standardization.

companies.name: Niños Pre-School
companies.description: The Niños Pre-School is a Montessori-based education system for children from two-and-a-half years to six years. The Montessori methodology involves a curriculum of learning that includes creating an environment for children that foster their physical, intellectual, emotional and spiritual growth.

companies.name: Chaudhary Education Foundation
companies.description: The Chaudhary Education Foundation is a vertical of Chaudhary Group that founded The Chandbagh School in 1996.

companies.name: The Chandbagh School
companies.description: The Chandbagh School was founded in 1996 by the Chaudhary Education Foundation, a vertical of Chaudhary Group. At present, the school is managed by CG|Education. It began operating as a primary day boarding school and today it is a full-fledged secondary and higher school, having affiliations with Nepal Education Board [NEB], Nepal and Central Board of Secondary Education [CBSE], India.

companies.name: Delhi Public School
companies.description: Established in 2004, Delhi Public School [DPS] is one of the most reputed institutions in the mid-southern region of Nepal. The school caters to students from Nepal and India. DPS is affiliated with Nepal Education Board [NEB] and Central Board of Secondary Education [CBSE], India.

companies.name: Sun-Rise English School
companies.description: The school is the youngest member of the CG|Education family. It is located in the mid-central region of the country. SRES was established by a highly-experienced team of local educators in 1987. CG|Education’s effective involvement and intervention has enhanced SRES brand as an apex educational institution.

companies.name: Campion School
companies.description: Campion School is one of the premium schools in Lalitpur District. The school is affiliated with Nepal Education Board [NEB]. It is located in a serene environment with spacious buildings equipped with modern facilities.

companies.name: Campion Academy
companies.description: Campion Academy is a leading institution in Kathmandu valley, offering 10+2 [NEB] and A-Levels Cambridge programs. It was established in the year 1995 with a firm commitment to its motto ‘Education Par Excellence’.

companies.name: Campion College
companies.description: Campion College, established in 1997 is a higher education wing of CG Education. College offers various undergraduate and postgraduates programs such as BBA, BA/BASW, BBS, MBS, MA (English/Sociology).

companies.name: Campion Kathmandu Secondary School
companies.description: Campion Kathmandu Secondary School [CKSS] is renowned amongst those aspiring for quality education. It offers K-12 educational structure and is affiliated with Nepal Education Board [NEB]. CKSS was established in the year 2004 and has modern infrastructure and facility.

companies.name: CG Electronics
companies.description: CG Electronics has been the market leader for over 40 years, offering top quality, life-enhancing products. The company is dealing in over nine brands including the home-grown CG brand.

companies.name: cgdigital.com.np
companies.description: cgdigital.com.np is an e-commerce online portal venture with CG Electronics with more than 1,0,000 hits and an only dedicated consumer durables e-commerce site in Nepal. It offers the widest range of electronics products like Audio Visual, Home Appliances, Small Home Appliances of many leading domestic as well as international brands in a common platform with 24 X 7 service and facility.

companies.name: Nabil Bank Limited
companies.description: Nepal’s first private commercial bank, operating since July 1984. It provides a full range of commercial banking services through its 119 branches, over 1500 Nabil Remit agents, and 185 ATMs throughout the nation.

companies.name: Nabil Investment Banking Ltd.
companies.description: Established in 2010 to provide complete investment banking solutions and advice to individuals and corporate clients worldwide. It is licensed by the Securities Board of Nepal (SEBON) as a Securities Businessperson (Merchant Banker).

companies.name: CG Finco Ltd.
companies.description: No. 1 Principal agent of Western Union Financial service Inc. (USA), involved in inward money transfer from different parts of the globe since 2003. It has established over 3,000 payout locations covering every corner of Nepal.

companies.name: United Remit Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Incorporated in 2005 with the objective of providing all kinds of remittance services from around the world under one roof at a low cost and safer way. It is one of the Prime Super Agent of MoneyGram Inc. in Nepal.

companies.name: CG Developers Pvt Ltd.
companies.description: CG Developers Pvt Ltd. is the primary real estate development unit of Chaudhary Group. It is managed by a team of engineers, architects and specialists based in Kathmandu, dedicated to developing environmentally sustainable, strategically located and economically viable property in Nepal.

companies.name: Kathmandu Residency
companies.description: Kathmandu Residency, the company's first housing project is located on the quiet southern bank of the river Bagmati. It is the first organized apartment in Nepal.

companies.name: CG Hills
companies.description: CG Hills is conveniently situated at a location far – enough to escape the noise and congestion of the city but only a few minutes’ drive from Narayan Gopal Chowk, Kathmandu. CG Hills offers eco-friendly, self-contained homes with their own parking facility, an attractive clubhouse, state-of-the-art gym, grocery store, community hall, beauty parlor and yoga hall to cater to all its residents.

companies.name: CG Hills Premium
companies.description: CG Hills Bhaisepati is the latest and most ambitious project of CG Developers. It is ideally located just a couple of kilometers away from Ekantakuna, nearby hospital MediCiti and department stores. Therefore, it has a picturesque backdrop of Green hills and Kathmandu City Modern living in perfect proximity from nature and all facilities required yet just sufficiently away from the congested city.

companies.name: CG Landmark
companies.description: CG Landmark is Nepal’s first world-class multipurpose complex, centrally located in Chitwan, in the proximity of Bharatpur Airport promising to enhance the charm of the exquisite city. The edifice with a built-up area of 1,80,000 sq.ft.,is a ten-storied structure enclosing a four- storied mall and a luxury business hotel.

companies.name: CG Realty
companies.description: In 2004, Chaudhary Group established its operations in Dubai under the name CG Realty. It has undertaken and completed projects covering more than 1,000,000 sq ft in area. Among its many developments in Dubai, CG Realty built two residential buildings in the International City area under its Sunstar brand and has invested in projects in Dubai like the Discovery Gardens.

companies.name: Sunstar
companies.description: Among its many developments in Dubai, CG Realty built two residential buildings in the International City area under its Sunstar brand.

companies.name: Discovery Gardens
companies.description: CG Realty has invested in projects in Dubai like the Discovery Gardens.

companies.name: CG Energy Infrastructure Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: A unit of Chaudhary Group actively involved in the development and construction of hydropower, biomass to energy and waste to energy conversion, energy-efficient technologies, carbon trading, solar power and more.

companies.name: Himal Hydro
companies.description: A leading construction company of Nepal serving key public and private sector clients in the fields of Hydropower, Tunneling, Transmission Line, Ropeways, Water & Wastewater and General Construction since 1978 acquired 78% stake by Nepal Jalabidhyut Parbardan tatha Bikas Limited (NJPBL).

companies.name: Nepal Jalabidhyut Parbardan tatha Bikas Limited
companies.description: Acquired a 78% stake in Himal Hydro.

companies.name: Modi Hydro Power Project
companies.description: An 18 MW run-of-river project located in the Gandaki Zone of Western Development. The electricity generated from this plant will be connected to the National Grid at the Modi Khola Power Plant Sub Station through a 4km long 132kV single circuit transmission line.

companies.name: Dudh Koshi-5 Hydropower Project
companies.description: A run-of-river type scheme having an installed capacity of 110 MW with the design discharge of 52.46 m3/s at Q40 exceedance of flow and available gross head of 258.09 m. The project is located in Mapya Dudhkoshi Gaunpalika of Solukhumbu District, Province #1 of Federal Republic of Nepal.

companies.name: CG Hotels and Resorts
companies.description: CG Hotels and Resorts has marked its presence in exquisite and world class properties in Maldives and Sri lanka. It also holds a plot of land in Koh Lone, Thailand and has joined hands with Taj Group and & Beyond to provide unparallel experience of the jungle in Central India and Nepal.

companies.name: The Zinc
companies.description: In the world of ever-changing hospitality, The Zinc hotels bring a new experience exceeding the dynamic needs of today’s travellers. A 5-star urban accommodation, The Zinc chain's upscale hotels are a one-stop destination of world-class amenities. Synonymous with class and elegance, the acclaimed high-end interiors impress guests with trailblazing style and taste, coupled with epicurean delicacies.

companies.name: The Fern
companies.description: A mid-scale to luxury hotel brand managed and owned by CG Hotels and Resorts through JV Company’s Concept Hospitality.

companies.name: Concept Hospitality
companies.description: A JV Company through which CG Hotels and Resorts manages and owns "The Fern" and "The Zinc" brands.

companies.name: CG Foods
companies.description: CG Foods first factory was established in 1984 in Kathmandu for manufacturing instant noodles in technical collaboration with Thai Preserved Food Factory, Thailand and became the first brown noodles manufacturer in Nepal under the brand Wai Wai. Since then besides expanding in 2 other locations in Nepal it spread its wings to India, Serbia, Kazakhstan and Bangladesh.

companies.name: Thai Preserved Food Factory
companies.description: A Thailand-based company that provided technical collaboration for CG Foods' first factory established in 1984 in Kathmandu for manufacturing instant noodles.

companies.name: Wai Wai
companies.description: This is synonymous with instant noodles in South Asia. It is the market leader in Nepal and in North East India. It is truly an instant noodle which can be consumed straight from the pack as it is a pre-cooked soup sprayed and fried noodle with three additional taste enhancer sachets inside.

companies.name: CG Food Nepal
companies.description: CG Food Nepal has one of the largest Noodle Production Centres in the South Asia Region. It has 9 noodle lines and four manufacturing locations in Nepal which have been named as CG Industrial Park (CGIP) at Nawalparasi, CG Food Park (CGFP) at Kathmandu, CG Food Park (CGFP) at Bardiya, and CG Food Park (CGFP) at Sunsari.

companies.name: CG Foods - Snacks
companies.description: CG is the leading Snacks Foods manufacturing company in Nepal under its flagship brand Kwik’s with products ranging from Extruded and Fried Snacks, Potato Chips, Chocolate Enrobed wafer and Peanut Bar. It has 2 manufacturing units in Nepal and one in India.

companies.name: Kwik’s
companies.description: The flagship brand of CG Foods - Snacks, with products ranging from Extruded and Fried Snacks, Potato Chips, Chocolate Enrobed wafer and Peanut Bar.

companies.name: CG Beverage
companies.description: CG Beverage was established in 1998 for the production of fruit based drinks under the brand RIO and is fast emerging as one of the preferred brands of consumers. It now produces more than 100 million packets a year and produces popular flavors like Alfonso Mango, Mixed Fruit, Apple and Pineapple.

companies.name: Rio
companies.description: It now produces more than 100 million packets a year and produces popular flavors like Alfonso Mango, Mixed Fruit, Apple and Pineapple under its brand name Rio.

companies.name: Jucilo
companies.description: As an extension of the Rio brand a sub-category brand “Jucilo” targeting youth has been launched in 2 flavours Mango and litchi.

companies.name: CG Pay
companies.description: CG Pay launched in 2020 with the aim of developing and promoting e-commerce, e-payment system and other alternative payment mechanisms.

companies.name: CG Packaging (Nepal) Pvt Ltd.
companies.description: CG Packaging (Nepal) Pvt Ltd. was set up in 2010 with the objective of manufacturing high-quality corrugated boxes for all of CG verticals and external customers. CG Packaging supplies corrugated boxes used by Chaudhary Group for the storage and distribution of a wide range of food and beverage items they produce.

companies.name: CG Cement Global
companies.description: CG Cement Global is a wholly- owned subsidiary of the Singapore-based CG Corp Global, the international arm of the Chaudhary Group. The vision of the cement vertical is to provide high- quality, strong cement-based products for the nation. CG Cement has one operating unit in Nepal and is building a clinkerization plant in Palpa, which will allow the process to be backwardly integrated.

companies.name: CG Corp Global
companies.description: The international arm of the Chaudhary Group based in Singapore.

companies.name: CG Brewery Nepal Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: CG Brewery Nepal Pvt. Ltd. (CGBN) was established in 1997 as the brewery arm of Chaudhary Group. It has the capacity of producing 585,000 Hectoliters (HL) beer per year. It is an ISO 9001:2015 certified company and has been awarded NS:23 by Nepal Bureau of standards and Metrology Govt. of Nepal for quality production.

companies.name: Nepal Ice Natura
companies.description: Nepal Ice Natura is Nepal's first all-barley beer made from 100% natural barley. This type of beer is manufactured by a few world-class companies around the world, an elite club that CG Brewery has joined to offer Nepalese Consumers a unique experience of drinking high-quality barley beer.

companies.name: Nepal Ice Strong
companies.description: Nepal Ice Strong is a premium strong beer. The excellent taste of Nepal Ice Strong comes from a perfect blend of the finest malts and grains, the best hops and pure yeast.

companies.name: Nepal Ice Premium
companies.description: With the tagline “RECALL YOUR HAPPINESS” Nepal Ice Premium has been introduced in select markets across the country with an objective to cater local youth consumers and tourists who have preference for purely Nepali lager beer with International Standard. With a perfect blend of imported malt, exotic hops, pure water and yeast “Nepal Ice Premium” is distinct in terms of quality and taste.

companies.name: Nepal Ice Magna
companies.description: Nepal Ice Magna was introduced in limited markets across the country with the objective of catering wheat beer consumers. It is brewed from finest Two-Row wheat with exotic hops from Europe. It is Nepal's First wheat beer and is dedicated to lovers of wheat beer.

companies.name: Mustang Premium Strong
companies.description: Mustang Premium Strong is a world-class premium strong beer, made by using imported malts, the best hops and pure water which gives aromatic flavor.

companies.name: Real Gold 5000
companies.description: Real Gold 5000 is an economy strong beer which was introduced in selected markets across Nepal and has become a popular brand. It is available in 650 ml bottle and 500 ml CAN.

companies.name: Real Gold 10000
companies.description: Real Gold 10000 is an economy strong beer which was introduced in the central regions of Nepal. It is a clean and clear beer with aromatic flavors.

companies.name: Real Gold Strong
companies.description: Real Gold Strong is a strong beer which contains 7% alcohol by volume and is available in 650ml bottle. It is focused in the Terai regions, where strong beer is popular. The great taste of Real Gold Strong comes from world-class malt and grains.

companies.name: Real Gold Lager
companies.description: Real Gold Lager is a popular beer in the eastern regions of Nepal. With 5.5% alcohol by volume and an excellent combination of fine malts, water and yeast this beer has an aromatic flavor.

companies.name: Leopards
companies.description: Leopard is an economy standard strong beer which was introduced in specific regions across Nepal. It is a crisp, clean beer with aromatic flavors.

companies.name: Rewards 5000
companies.description: Rewards 5000 is brewed with the finest malt and the choicest hops to a recipe that produces a smooth drinking and full-bodied beer. It is a reward to our distinguished customers for their success.

companies.name: CG Telecom Private Limited
companies.description: CG Telecom Private Limited is rolling out to provid high quality GSM and other telecom services. Through the acquisition of STM Telecom Sanchar Pvt Ltd, CG Telecom is currently catering to the needs of the rural population of Nepal.

companies.name: STM Telecom Sanchar Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: STM Telecom Sanchar Pvt. Ltd. (now CG communications Pvt. Ltd.) is a leading telecom operator in Nepal since its inception in 2003. It was awarded a Rural Telecommunication Service license from Nepal Telecommunications Authority to setup a rural network with 1068 PCOs using VSAT technology in Eastern Development Region.

companies.name: CG Communications
companies.description: CG communications Pvt. Ltd. (Previously STM Telecom Sanchar Pvt. Ltd.) is a leading telecom operator in Nepal since its inception in 2003. Our service includes basic subscriber line, international long distance, payphone, wireless services, and Internet and tele-center.

companies.name: Torana Venture Capital Fund
companies.description: Torana Venture Capital Fund, a joint initiative of Chaudhary Group and NE group is a Singapore- based private equity fund that invests in pre-seed and seed-stage companies demonstrating a minimum viable product, grown user base and revenue in the immediate future. The fund intends to be a partner with passionate entrepreneurs and innovative startups across North America, UK, Dubai, Singapore and India with no bar of sectoral specification.

companies.name: NE Group
companies.description: A joint initiative partner with Chaudhary Group for the Torana Venture Capital Fund.

companies.name: CG Energy Drink
companies.description: It has expanded its production to Energy Drink that mainly focuses on those who are looking for an affordable product to help them energize their life, increase alertness and enhance their physical and mental performance.

companies.name: Zinc Journey
companies.description: Zinc Journey explores the beauty of the destinations by delving into the rich unique culture to give their guests an experience of living in an enchanting story. Each property is about local customs, culture and heritage of the area which is not only eco-friendly but also flamboyant in architecture. Appealing to the adventurous travel kind, the Zinc Journey is a must for the traveler who likes to live an experience that combines with adventure, comfort, style and luxury.

companies.name: Arro Khampa, Shangri La, China
companies.description: Surrounded by the winding rivers in the ancient Tibetan town, Arro Khampa is located at a high altitude over 3200m from sea level. The first in a series of The Zinc Journey destinations, this adventurous getaway is designed to follow in the footsteps of the local forefathers who sought refuge after travelling and trading their way across the vast Tibetan plateau and the Ancient Tea Horse Road.

companies.name: Arro Khampa, Ligiang, China
companies.description: Arro Khampa Lijiang Hotel will enhance your journey with the spirit of ancient Tibetan and Naxi culture. Using architectural traditions of the region the structures resemble ancient village homes using thick rammed earth facades as well as stone and wood. Providing contemporary comfort while retaining the cultural integrity of traditional design, subtle modifications have been incorporated.

companies.name: Fairmont Mara Safari Club
companies.description: The Fairmont Mara Safari Club, a luxury Masai Mara resort hotel in Kenya, re-opened in 2009 following an extensive renovation program. Surrounded on three sides by the breathtaking Mara River, and on the edge of the world’s Seventh “New” Wonder of the World – the Masai Mara - Fairmont Mara Safari Club is the epitome of tented luxury.

companies.name: Fairmont The Norfolk Hotel, Kenya
companies.description: A beloved landmark dating back to 1904, Fairmont The Norfolk has played a pivotal role in Kenya’s historical legacy notably as the town and later the modern city of Nairobi grew around the property. Situated in the heart of the city, this celebrated hotel has welcomed prominent guests from royalty to statesmen, stars of the screen, musicians and influential personalities. A hidden gem with alluring old-world charm and elegant contemporary design, Fairmont The Norfolk offers guests a sophisticated retreat in the capital within easy reach of world-renowned wildlife centers, golf courses, museums, and the bourgeoning Nairobi art scene.

companies.name: Miraaya Wellness
companies.description: Located inside Chaudhary Group Industrial Park (CGIP) in Nawalparasi, CG Retreat is an exclusive boutique resort, a great weekend destination for wellness, spirituality and relaxation. You can enjoy golf, wellness and relaxation away from the hustle and bustle of the city life, amidst the chirping sounds of exotic birds with the grand backdrop of auspicious Shashwat Dham Temple.

companies.name: CG Retreat
companies.description: Located inside Chaudhary Group Industrial Park (CGIP) in Nawalparasi, CG Retreat is an exclusive boutique resort, a great weekend destination for wellness, spirituality and relaxation. You can enjoy golf, wellness and relaxation away from the hustle and bustle of the city life, amidst the chirping sounds of exotic birds with the grand backdrop of auspicious Shashwat Dham Temple.

companies.name: The Fern Residency
companies.description: The Fern Residency is a mid-tiered experience of Hotels & Resorts in the 3-4 star categories. It offers up market accommodation & services ideally suited to an emerging traveler. The Fern Residency hotels & resorts are present in key locations with great pricing and excellent service.

companies.name: The Fern Hotels and Resorts
companies.description: The Fern, an upscale 5-star business and full-service Ecotel, goes out of its way to deliver authentic and enriching experiences with minimal impact on the environment. Luxury, elegance, personalised service and all the contemporary facilities are combined to provide an environmentally-friendly hotel.

companies.name: Beacon Smart Efficient Hotels
companies.description: Beacon provides smart and efficient budget hotels with an emphasis on quality and value. The Beacon has presence in tier one and two cities, and is predominantly present in smaller cities. Comfort and convenience are their forte and the hotels enjoy home styled interiors so guests feel at home.

companies.name: Zinc Living
companies.description: Zinc Living is an urban service apartment combined with full service hotel amenities. A comfortable place to call home, with modern technology to keep up to date. Zinc Living stays relevant to changing needs of the residents and ideally suited for long stays.

companies.name: Taj Hotels Resorts & Palaces
companies.description: In partnership with Taj Group, CG Hotels and Resorts has marked its presence in exquisite and world class properties in Maldives and Sri lanka. It also holds a plot of land in Koh Lone,Thailand.

companies.name: Vivanta By Taj – Corel Reef Maldives
Taj Safaris
companies.description: CG Hotels and Resorts has joined hands with Taj Group and & Beyond (World’s leading luxury travel and ecotourism company) to provide unparallel experience of the jungle in Central India and Nepal. This resort owned by CG Hotels and Resorts and managed by Taj Safari limited is a luxurious hidden jungle resort overlooks river Rapti to face Chitwan National Park in central Nepal.

companies.name: Vivanta
companies.description: Located in the vibrant city of Kathmandu, the hotel whisks guests into an oasis of modern comforts in one of the most far-flung locations in the world. After a day of meetings or sightseeing in the city, head straight to our rooftop pool and Koko Bar to enjoy the finest views of Kathmandu over delightful Sundowners and Hors d'oeuvres.

companies.name: Radisson
companies.description: Radisson JFK Airport offers unparalleled experience to suit all your travel needs. It offers a prime location, leisure and convenience, whether you travel to New York for business, vacation or weekend gateway.

companies.name: CG Hospitality
companies.description: In collaboration with Jetwing Group in 2008, CG Hospitality owns, operates and manages two different hotels in Sri Lanka.

companies.name: Jetwing
companies.description: Nestled upon the edge of the Indian Ocean, Jetwing Sea is a contemporary coastal respite that blends the finest of tropical luxury with traditional Sri Lankan hospitality on the buzzing beach strip of Negombo. Travellers look forward to enjoying a unique approach to eco-living in an atmosphere of rural simplicity combined with lavish comforts of the modern world.

companies.name: Ekho
companies.description: Sigiriya, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, is one of the most dramatic, inspiring and beautiful historical locations in Sri Lanka that offers a lot to experience. Adorned by stunning waterfalls, EKHO Ella is located in close proximity to popular tourist attractions and claims to possess the best view of the ” Ella Gap”.
